summary: Films System Refactor (Part 1 & Part 2) testing complete. All 12 features tested successfully. Backend: 14/14 API tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified - Film grid, modal, public project page, and studio access page working correctly.

tests: GET /api/films returns list of films - PASS
CROWE has financial info (target_budget_range, financing_structure, incentives) - PASS
Studio access verify with valid token returns film and user - PASS
Studio access verify with invalid token returns 401 - PASS
Studio access verify without token returns error - PASS
Studio access verify for non-existent film returns error - PASS
NDA confirm with missing agreement returns 400 - PASS
List tokens filtered by film_id - PASS
Access logs endpoint returns logs - PASS

tests_passed: Films grid page loads with CROWE film card - PASS
Film modal opens on click with poster in 2:3 ratio (object-contain) - PASS
Film modal has 'View Project' CTA button - PASS
Public project page /films/crowe loads with Hero section - PASS
Public page has Logline section - PASS
Public page has Project Status section - PASS
Back to Films button works - PASS
Request Materials CTA visible (opens email) - PASS
Studio access page /studio-access/crowe?token=... verifies token - PASS
Studio access shows confidential banner with user name 'John Producer' - PASS
Studio access has standalone layout (no main site navigation) - PASS
Invalid token shows Access Denied page - PASS

features: Hero section with poster, title (Cinzel font), genres, status badge, tagline
Project Status section showing current stage
Token-based access control (401 for invalid/expired tokens)
Project Snapshot (genre, format, target budget, status)
Financial Overview (budget range, financing structure, tax incentives)
Access Denied page for invalid tokens
View Project CTA navigates to public page

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: StudioAccess.jsx verifyAccess() has a console error when response is not OK - body stream read twice issue (functional but noisy in console)
seed_data_creation: None - existing CROWE film data and test token used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Films System Refactor (Part 1 & Part 2) fully tested. Public project page at /films/{slug} shows Hero, Logline, Project Status, and CTAs. Studio access page at /studio-access/{slug}?token=... has token-based access control, confidential banner, project snapshot with financial data, and standalone layout. Invalid tokens show Access Denied page. Film model extended with studio_access_enabled, target_budget_range, financing_structure, incentives fields. Test token for 'John Producer' is 8c818a77-b274-492b-9a56-bb986bc3ec2c.
